name: sigen-mcp
description: Sigenergy ESS inverter management — Modbus TCP control, SigenCloud API, and GitBook doc query. Monitor PV production, battery SOC/SOH, grid import/export, set EMS modes, diagnose alarms, and configure TOU schedules. Companion skills for the @paulczar/sigen-*-mcp npm MCP servers.

plugins.name: sigen-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Sigenergy ESS companion skills — dashboard (sigen-status), diagnostics (sigen-diagnose), configuration (sigen-config), docs (sigen-docs), config optimizer (sigen-config-optimizer ⚠️), and VPP offboarding (sigen-vpp-offboard). Ships with MCP server templates for all three @paulczar/sigen-*-mcp packages.
